revision.comment: Disambiguating links to [[Fue]] (link changed to [[Fue (flute)]]) using [[User:Qwertyytrewqqwerty/DisamAssist|DisamAssist]].
revision.text:
{{navbox |title = [[Traditional Japanese musical instruments]] |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |name = Traditional Japanese musical instruments |listclass = hlist |group1 = String |list1 = {{navbox|subgroup |group1 = Plucked |list1 = *[[Biwa]] *[[Ichigenkin]] *[[Koto (instrument)|Koto]] *[[Konghou|Kugo]] *[[Sanshin]] **[[Gottan]] **[[Kankara sanshin|Kankara]] *[[Shamisen]] *[[Yamatogoto]] *[[Tonkori]] |group2 = Bowed |list2 = *[[Kokyū]] }} |group2 = Wind |list2 = {{navbox|subgroup |group1 = [[Fue (flute)|Flutes and
oboes]] |list1 = {{Fue|list only=true}} |group2 = Free-reed
pipes |list2 = *[[Shō (instrument)|Shō]] *[[Yu (wind instrument)|Yu]] |group3 = Horns |list3 = *[[Horagai]] }} |group3 = Percussion |list3 = {{navbox|subgroup |group1 = Drums |list1 = *[[Kakko (instrument)|Kakko]] *[[Taiko]] **[[Ōtsuzumi]] **[[Shime-daiko]] **[[Tsuzumi]] *[[Tsuri-daiko]] *[[Ikko (drum)|Ikko]] *[[San-no-tsuzumi]] *[[Den-den daiko]] |group2 = Blocks |list2 = *[[Hyoshigi|Hyōshigi]] *[[Wooden fish|Mokugyo]] *[[Sasara]] **[[Ita-sasara]] **[[Binzasara]] *[[Kokiriko]] *[[Shakubyoshi]] *[[Sanba]] |group3 = Gongs |list3 = *[[Shōko (instrument)|Shōko]] *[[Kagura suzu]] *[[Kane (instrument)|Kane]] }} |group4 = Others |list4 = *[[Mukkuri]] }} {{Documentation}}
